title: Pastinaca orphanidis

This plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help protect against diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of Pastinaca orphanidis include flavonoids, coumarins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
